summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Cambria Global EW 2 ETF (GEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund provides diversified exposure to global equities through an actively managed portfolio concentrated on large-cap companies. It offered initial investors a way to diversify taxable holdings via a 351 exchange.

data.title: Cambria Expands 351 Exchange ETF Lineup with Launch of Cambria Global EW 2 ETF (GEQ)

holdings.infoBox: GEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 740 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 4.05%, iShares Core S&P 500 ETF at 3.31%, Microsoft at 3.16%, NVIDIA at 2.83%, and State Street® SPDR® S&P 500® ETF at 2.50%.
